fiat_stable_hints: PYUSD - PayPal stablecoin with broad integrations; liquidity: ~$4B
FDUSD - Binance-related fiat stable; liquidity: top-tier CEX liquidity
TUSD - Legacy fiat stable; liquidity: legacy/liquid on selected venues
GUSD - Gemini Dollar; liquidity: legacy/liquid on selected venues
HUSD - Legacy fiat stable; liquidity: legacy, limited current depth
BUIDL - BlackRock tokenized Treasury fund (RWA); liquidity: large RWA allocation
USYC - Circle yield-bearing Treasury/repo token (RWA); liquidity: institutional RWA usage
USDY - Ondo yield-bearing USD token; liquidity: active RWA/yield usage
FRXUSD - Frax fully collateralized USD stable; liquidity: mid-tier DeFi liquidity
CGUSD - Cygnus Finance Global USD; liquidity: ~$75M
algo_stable_hints: USDS - Sky (ex-Maker) decentralized stable, yield-oriented; liquidity: ~$11.7B
USDE - Ethena synthetic delta-neutral stable; liquidity: ~$5.88B
DAI - Classic decentralized overcollateralized stable; liquidity: ~$5.36B
GHO - Aave-native stable, strongest in Aave E-Mode; liquidity: ~$584M
FRAX - Frax hybrid stable with deep DeFi integrations; liquidity: ~$200-600M
FRXUSD - Frax USD variant, Curve-integrated; liquidity: ~$200-600M
MIM - Magic Internet Money (Abracadabra), higher-risk niche; liquidity: ~$30-100M
DOLA - Inverse Finance overcollateralized stable; liquidity: ~$50-150M
USDD - Tron-focused stable, limited core Ethereum composability; liquidity: ~$1.1B
USX - Niche stable with relatively shallow pools; liquidity: ~$350-400M
RWAUSDI - RWA-hybrid stable with redemption/structure risks; liquidity: ~$300M
REUSD - Resupply niche yield/RWA stable; liquidity: ~$100-150M
SATUSD - Low-cap stable; liquidity: very low
USDAI - Variant stable with moderate cap, lower DeFi activity; liquidity: moderate
coin_hints: ETH - Native token of Ethereum - core asset of all DeFi
WBTC - Wrapped Bitcoin - most liquid BTC on EVM chains
STETH - Lido staked ETH - leading liquid staking token
WSTETH - Wrapped version of stETH - highly composable
WEETH - Ether.fi restaked ETH - popular liquid restaking token
BNB - Native token of BNB Chain - deep pools on PancakeSwap
LINK - Chainlink - leading oracle token
UNI - Uniswap governance token - largest EVM DEX
AAVE - Aave protocol token - top DeFi lending
ARB - Arbitrum governance token - major L2
OP - Optimism governance token - Ethereum L2
AVAX - Avalanche C-Chain (EVM compatible)
XRP - Cross-border payments (via EVM bridges)
ADA - Cardano (via EVM sidechains and bridges)
BCH - Bitcoin Cash (bridged on EVM)
XLM - Stellar (limited EVM integration)
HYPE - Hyperliquid-related token
LEO - UNUS SED LEO (Bitfinex utility)
OKB - OKX exchange token
WBT - WhiteBIT token
commodity_hints: XAUT - Tether Gold, 1 token = 1 troy ounce physical LBMA gold (Swiss vaults); liquidity: highest among commodity tokens
PAXG - Pax Gold, 1 token = 1 troy ounce LBMA physical gold (London vaults); liquidity: high with strong transparency
KAU - Kinesis Gold, about 1 gram allocated physical gold per token; liquidity: yield-bearing fee-share model
KAG - Kinesis Silver, 1 token = 1 troy ounce physical silver; liquidity: yield-bearing fee-share model
CGO - Comtech Gold, physical gold-backed token (UAE regulated, Shariah-compliant); liquidity: niche but growing
meme_hints: DOGE - Original meme coin, broad multi-chain presence; liquidity: ~$13-15B
SHIB - Shiba Inu on Ethereum + Shibarium L2; liquidity: ~$3.4B
PEPE - Pure frog meme, native ERC-20 on Ethereum; liquidity: ~$1.38B
FLOKI - Utility meme with gaming/NFT components; liquidity: active on Ethereum + BNB Chain
BRETT - Base chain mascot meme; liquidity: strong Base community activity
MOG - Cat meme token; liquidity: native Ethereum meme liquidity
TRUMP - Political/hype meme; liquidity: mostly Ethereum/Base venues
PUMP - Hype meme token; liquidity: mostly Ethereum/Base venues
SPX - SPX6900 degenerate meme; liquidity: Ethereum/Base cross-chain presence
TURBO - AI-generated meme, native on Ethereum; liquidity: mid-tier meme liquidity
TOSHI - Base chain cat meme; liquidity: active Base L2 community
